sentences.sentence: Packaging
sentences.translation: 药品包装
difficult_points: 这是本节小标题，概括下文讨论的药品包装问题。
Packaging 在此是名词，指药品包装及相关信息材料的整体设计。

sentences.sentence: One of the most prominent design issues in pharmacy is that of drag packaging and patient information leaflets (Pits).
sentences.translation: 药学领域最突出的设计问题之一，是药品包装和患者信息说明书（PILs）的设计。

structure.text: One of the most prominent design issues in pharmacy
that of drag packaging and patient information leaflets (Pits)

difficult_points: that 代替 design issue，避免重复，完整含义是 the design issue of...。
源文的 drag packaging 和 Pits 疑为 OCR 错误，语境应为 drug packaging 与 PILs；解析保留原文，翻译按药品包装和患者说明书理解。

expressions.text: one of the most prominent issues

sentences.sentence: Many letters have appeared in The Journal's letters pages over the years from pharmacists dismayed at the designs of packaging that are "accidents waiting to happen".
sentences.translation: 多年来，《药学杂志》的读者来信版刊登了许多药剂师的来信，他们对那些无异于“事故隐患”的包装设计感到忧虑。

structure.text: in The Journal's letters pages over the years
from pharmacists dismayed at the designs of packaging

difficult_points: from pharmacists... 说明来信来源；dismayed at... 是过去分词短语，修饰 pharmacists。
that 修饰 designs of packaging；accidents waiting to happen 是比喻，指极易酿成事故的隐患。

expressions.meaning_zh: 迟早会引发事故的隐患

sentences.sentence: Packaging design in the pharmaceutical industry is handled by either in-house teams or design agencies.
sentences.translation: 制药行业的包装设计由内部团队或设计机构负责。

structure.text: Packaging design in the pharmaceutical industry
by either in-house teams or design agencies

difficult_points: is handled by 是被动语态，说明负责设计的主体。
either... or... 连接两类承担者：企业内部团队和外部设计机构。

sentences.sentence: Designs for over-the-counter medicines, where characteristics such as attractiveness and distinguish-ability are regarded as significant, are usually commissioned from design agencies.
sentences.translation: 非处方药的包装设计通常委托设计机构完成，因为这类药品十分看重吸引力和辨识度等特征。

structure.text: where characteristics such as attractiveness and distinguish-ability are regarded as significant

difficult_points: where 语义上指 over-the-counter medicines 所属的设计情境，补充其重视的特征。
are commissioned from 表示设计工作委托给外部机构；distinguish-ability 是源文写法，意为辨识度。

sentences.sentence: A marketing team will prepare a brief and the designers will come up with perhaps six or seven designs.
sentences.translation: 营销团队会先准备设计简报，设计师随后提出大约六七个方案。

structure.text: and the designers will come up with perhaps six or seven designs

difficult_points: and 连接两个具有不同主语的完整分句，描述设计流程的先后环节。
brief 在设计语境中指说明目标和要求的设计简报；come up with 表示提出方案。

sentences.sentence: These are whittled down to two or three that might be tested on a consumer group.
sentences.translation: 这些方案会被逐步筛减至两三个，再由消费者小组进行测试。

structure.text: that might be tested on a consumer group

difficult_points: These 回指 six or seven designs；whittle down 是逐渐削减、筛选的比喻。
that 修饰 two or three，实际指保留下来的两三个 designs；might be tested 是情态动词加被动语态。

sentences.sentence: In contrast, most designs for prescription-only products are created in-house.
sentences.translation: 相比之下，大多数处方药产品的设计由企业内部完成。
difficult_points: In contrast 将处方药包装与前文通常外包的非处方药包装作对比。
in-house 在此作副词，表示设计在公司内部完成。

sentences.sentence: In some cases, this may simply involve applying a company's house design (ie, logo, colour, font, etc).
sentences.translation: 在某些情况下，这可能只是套用公司的统一设计规范，例如标志、颜色、字体等。

structure.text: applying a company's house design (ie, logo, colour, font, etc)

difficult_points: this 指公司内部完成处方药包装设计；may 表示并非所有情况都如此。
involve 后接动名词 applying；house design 指企业统一的品牌视觉规范，并非“房屋设计”。

sentences.sentence: The chosen design is then handed over to design engineers who work out how the packaging will be produced.
sentences.translation: 选定的方案随后交给设计工程师，由他们确定包装的生产方式。

structure.text: who work out how the packaging will be produced
how the packaging will be produced

difficult_points: chosen 是过去分词作前置修饰；is handed over to 表示方案移交给下一环节。
who 修饰 design engineers；how 从句作 work out 的宾语，使用被动语态说明包装如何生产。

sentences.sentence: Design considerations
sentences.translation: 设计方面的考量
difficult_points: 这是本节小标题，引出药品包装在真实使用情境中的设计问题。
considerations 在此指设计时必须纳入权衡的因素。

sentences.sentence: The author of the recently published "Information design for patient safety," Thea Swayne, tracked the journey of a medicine from manufacturing plant, through distribution warehouses, pharmacies and hospital wards, to patients' homes.
sentences.translation: 新近出版的《患者安全信息设计》一书作者西娅·斯韦恩，追踪了药品从生产厂出发，经配送仓库、药房和医院病房，最终到达患者家中的全过程。

structure.text: The author of the recently published "Information design for patient safety,"
from manufacturing plant, through distribution warehouses, pharmacies and hospital wards, to patients' homes

difficult_points: Thea Swayne 是句首主语的同位语，补充作者姓名。
from... through... to... 清楚标出药品供应链从生产到患者家庭的完整路径。

sentences.sentence: Her book highlights a multitude of design problems with current packaging, such as look-alikes and sound-alikes, small type sizes and glare on blister foils.
sentences.translation: 她的书重点指出当前包装存在的众多设计问题，例如外观相似、名称读音相近、字号过小以及泡罩铝箔反光。

structure.text: a multitude of design problems with current packaging
such as look-alikes and sound-alikes, small type sizes and glare on blister foils

difficult_points: a multitude of 强调问题数量很多；with current packaging 说明问题所在。
look-alikes 和 sound-alikes 指外观或名称读音容易混淆的药品；such as 后列举四类问题。

expressions.meaning_zh: 外观相似与读音相近的产品

sentences.sentence: Situations in which medicines are used include a parent giving a cough medicine to a child in the middle of the night and a busy pharmacist selecting one box from hundreds.
sentences.translation: 用药情境包括家长半夜给孩子服用止咳药，以及忙碌的药剂师从数百个药盒中选取一个。

structure.text: a parent giving a cough medicine to a child in the middle of the night
and a busy pharmacist selecting one box from hundreds

difficult_points: in which 引导定语从句修饰 Situations，介词 in 前置。
include 后是两个“名词 + 现在分词”结构，分别描述家长给药和药剂师选药的真实场景。

expressions.text: in the middle of the night

sentences.sentence: It is argued that packaging should be designed for moments such as these."Manufacturers are not aware of the complex situations into which products go.
sentences.translation: 有人主张，包装应针对这类关键时刻来设计。斯韦恩指出：“制造商没有意识到产品会进入何等复杂的使用情境。”

structure.text: that packaging should be designed for moments such as these
the complex situations into which products go

difficult_points: 源文在句号与开引号之间缺少空格，因此为保持原文完整性将论述句与引语首句保留在同一单元。
第一句 It 是形式主语，that 从句是真正主语；these 指上一句列举的夜间给药和繁忙选药情境。
into which 是“介词 + 关系代词”结构，修饰 situations，表示产品进入的使用环境。

sentences.sentence: As designers, we are interested in not what is supposed to happen in hospital wards, but what happens in the real world," Ms Swayne said.
sentences.translation: 斯韦恩女士说：“作为设计师，我们关注的不是医院病房里按设想应该发生什么，而是现实世界中实际发生什么。”

structure.text: not what is supposed to happen in hospital wards, but what happens in the real world
what is supposed to happen in hospital wards
what happens in the real world

difficult_points: not... but... 对比理想流程与现实行为；两个 what 从句都作 interested in 的宾语。
is supposed to happen 表示按制度或设想应该发生，而非实际事实。
句末 Ms Swayne said 是引语报道语。

sentences.sentence: Incidents where vein has been injected intrathecally instead of spine are a classic example of how poor design can contribute to harm.
sentences.translation: 将源文所称的 vein 错误地进行鞘内注射而不是 spine 的事故，是糟糕设计可能造成伤害的典型例子。

structure.text: where vein has been injected intrathecally instead of spine
a classic example of how poor design can contribute to harm
how poor design can contribute to harm

difficult_points: where 引导定语从句修饰 Incidents；has been injected 是现在完成时被动。
源文的 vein 和 spine 在医学语义上明显异常，可能是药名等内容的 OCR 误识；为遵守原文完整性未擅自改正。
how 从句作 of 的宾语，说明糟糕设计以何种方式导致伤害。

sentences.sentence: Investigations following these tragedies have attributed some blame to poor typescript.
sentences.translation: 这些悲剧发生后的调查认为，糟糕的文字排印也应承担部分责任。
difficult_points: following these tragedies 修饰 Investigations，表示调查发生在悲剧之后。
attribute blame to 表示把责任归于某个原因；typescript 在此按包装文字排印或字体设计理解。

sentences.sentence: Safety and compliance
sentences.translation: 安全性与依从性
difficult_points: 这是本节小标题，引出儿童安全包装与患者用药依从性。
compliance 在医药语境中指患者按说明正确服药的依从性。

sentences.sentence: Child protection is another area that gives designers opportunities to improve safety.
sentences.translation: 儿童保护是另一个能让设计师通过设计提升安全性的领域。

structure.text: that gives designers opportunities to improve safety

difficult_points: that 修饰 another area，并在从句中作主语。
give designers opportunities to... 是双宾语结构，to improve... 说明 opportunities 的内容。

sentences.sentence: According to the Child Accident Prevention Trust, seven out of 10 children admitted to hospital with suspected poisoning have swallowed medicines.
sentences.translation: 据儿童事故预防基金会统计，因疑似中毒入院的儿童中，十个有七个曾误吞药物。

structure.text: According to the Child Accident Prevention Trust
admitted to hospital with suspected poisoning

difficult_points: seven out of 10 表示十分之七；admitted... 是过去分词短语，修饰 children。
with suspected poisoning 说明入院时怀疑的病因；have swallowed 表示此前已经发生误吞。

sentences.sentence: Although child-resistant closures have reduced the number of incidents, they are not: fully child-proof.
sentences.translation: 尽管儿童防开启瓶盖减少了事故数量，但它们并非完全能防止儿童打开。

structure.text: Although child-resistant closures have reduced the number of incidents

difficult_points: Although 引导让步从句，说明事故虽减少但包装并非绝对安全。
they 指 child-resistant closures；源文 not 后的冒号属于异常标点，解析时按 not fully child-proof 理解并原样保留。

sentences.sentence: The definition of such a closure is one that not more than 15 percent of children aged between 42 and 51 months can open within five minutes.
sentences.translation: 这类瓶盖的定义是：42至51个月大的儿童中，能在五分钟内将其打开的比例不超过15%。

structure.text: The definition of such a closure
that not more than 15 percent of children aged between 42 and 51 months can open within five minutes

difficult_points: one 代替 a closure；that 引导定语从句修饰 one，并作 open 的宾语。
not more than 15 percent 是儿童比例；aged... 修饰 children，within five minutes 限定测试时间。

sentences.sentence: There is scope for improving what is currently available, according to Richard Mawle, a freelance product designer.
sentences.translation: 自由职业产品设计师理查德·莫尔认为，现有产品仍有改进空间。

structure.text: scope for improving what is currently available

difficult_points: There is scope for... 表示仍存在做某事的空间；for 后接动名词 improving。
what is currently available 是融合关系从句，作 improving 的宾语，指现有包装。
a freelance product designer 是 Richard Mawle 的同位语。

sentences.sentence: "Many child-resistant packs
sentences.translation: “许多儿童防开启包装……（引语接下段）
difficult_points: 源文在段落边界处把完整引语拆开，本片段需与下一段开头 are based on strength 连读。
Many child-resistant packs 是跨段句子的主语，本段尚未出现谓语。

sentences.sentence: are based on strength.
sentences.translation: （接上段）是以使用者的力量为开启门槛的。
difficult_points: 本片段延续上一段 Many child-resistant packs，合起来构成完整被动结构 are based on strength。
be based on strength 表示包装依靠足够的手部力量来限制开启。

sentences.sentence: They do not necessarily prevent a child from access, but may prevent people with a disability," he told The Journal.
sentences.translation: 他对《药学杂志》说：“它们未必能阻止儿童接触药物，却可能把残障人士挡在外面。”

structure.text: do not necessarily prevent a child from access
but may prevent people with a disability

difficult_points: They 回指 child-resistant packs；not necessarily 表示“未必”，而非完全否定。
but 对比包装对儿童可能无效、却可能妨碍残障人士的反常结果。
prevent a child from access 是源文搭配，常规表达通常是 prevent a child from gaining access。

sentences.sentence: "The legal requirements are there for a good reason, but they are not good enough in terms of the users," he said.
sentences.translation: 他说：“这些法律要求的存在有充分理由，但从使用者角度看，它们还不够完善。”

structure.text: but they are not good enough in terms of the users

difficult_points: are there 不是地点指示，而是表示法律要求确实存在；for a good reason 说明其合理性。
they 回指 legal requirements；in terms of the users 限定评价角度。

sentences.sentence: "Older people, especially those with arthritis, may have the same level of strength as a child," he explained, and suggested that better designs could rely on cognitive skills (eg, making the opening of a container a three-step process) or be based on the physical size of hands.
sentences.translation: 他解释说：“老年人，尤其是关节炎患者，力量可能与儿童相当。”他还建议，更好的设计可以依靠认知能力（例如把开容器设计为三步流程），或依据手掌的实际尺寸。

structure.text: Older people, especially those with arthritis, may have the same level of strength as a child
that better designs could rely on cognitive skills (eg, making the opening of a container a three-step process) or be based on the physical size of hands

difficult_points: those 代替 older people；the same... as... 比较老年人与儿童的力量水平。
he explained 和 suggested 是并列报道谓语；that 从句作 suggested 的宾语。
rely on... 与 be based on... 是 could 后并列的两种设计思路，后者省略 could。

sentences.sentence: Mr. Mawle worked with GlaxoSmithKline on a project to improve compliance through design, which involved applying his skills to packaging and PILs.
sentences.translation: 莫尔先生与葛兰素史克合作开展一个通过设计提高用药依从性的项目，其中需要把他的设计技能应用于药品包装和患者信息说明书。

structure.text: on a project to improve compliance through design
which involved applying his skills to packaging and PILs

difficult_points: to improve... 后置修饰 project，说明项目目标；through design 表示实现手段。
which 指整个 project；involve 后接动名词 applying，apply A to B 表示把技能用于包装和说明书。

expressions.meaning_zh: 通过设计提高用药依从性

sentences.sentence: Commenting on the information presented, he said: "There can be an awful lot of junk at the beginning of PILs.
sentences.translation: 谈到说明书中呈现的信息时，他说：“患者信息说明书开头往往有大量无用内容。”

structure.text: There can be an awful lot of junk at the beginning of PILs

difficult_points: Commenting... 是现在分词状语，逻辑主语是 he；presented 修饰 information。
There can be 是存在结构；junk 在这里指对患者无用或干扰阅读的信息。

sentences.sentence: For example, why are company details listed towards the beginning of a leaflet when what might be more important for the patient is that the medicine should not be taken with alcohol?"
sentences.translation: 例如，如果对患者更重要的信息是这种药不能与酒精同服，为什么公司资料却列在说明书前部呢？”

structure.text: why are company details listed towards the beginning of a leaflet
when what might be more important for the patient is that the medicine should not be taken with alcohol
what might be more important for the patient
that the medicine should not be taken with alcohol

difficult_points: 主句是 why 引导的直接疑问句，使用倒装语序 are company details listed。
when 在此带有“既然、而实际情况是”的对比意味。
what 从句作主语；that 从句作表语，说明对患者更重要的具体信息。

sentences.sentence: Design principles and guidelines
sentences.translation: 设计原则与指南
difficult_points: 这是本节小标题，引出药品包装的视觉设计原则与法规要求。
principles 指一般设计原则，guidelines 指可供执行的具体指导。

sentences.sentence: Look-alike boxes present a potential for picking errors and an obvious solution would be to use colours to highlight different strengths.
sentences.translation: 外观相似的药盒可能导致取药错误，一个显而易见的办法是用颜色突出不同药物强度。

structure.text: and an obvious solution would be to use colours to highlight different strengths
to use colours to highlight different strengths

difficult_points: and 连接问题与解决方案两个完整分句。
picking errors 指药剂师从货架或库存中拿错药；strengths 指同一药品的不同剂量强度。
第一个 to use 作表语，第二个 to highlight 表示使用颜色的目的。

sentences.sentence: However, according to Ms. Swayne, colour differentiation needs to be approached with care.
sentences.translation: 不过，斯韦恩女士认为，使用颜色加以区分需要谨慎处理。
difficult_points: needs to be approached 是 need + 被动不定式，表示颜色区分这一做法需要被谨慎对待。
with care 是方式状语，说明不能简单依赖颜色编码。

sentences.sentence: Not only should strong colour contrasts be used, but designating a colour to a particular strength (colour coding) is not recommended because this could lead to the user not reading the text on a box.
sentences.translation: 不仅应采用强烈的颜色对比，而且不建议把某种颜色固定对应某一剂量强度（颜色编码），因为这可能导致使用者不再阅读药盒上的文字。

structure.text: Not only should strong colour contrasts be used
but designating a colour to a particular strength (colour coding) is not recommended
because this could lead to the user not reading the text on a box
the user not reading the text on a box

difficult_points: Not only 位于句首触发部分倒装，正常语序为 strong colour contrasts should be used。
but 后动名词短语 designating... 作主语，谓语使用单数 is。
lead to 中 to 是介词；the user 是动名词 not reading 的逻辑主语。

sentences.sentence: Design features can provide the basis for lengthy debates.
sentences.translation: 设计特征可能成为长期争论的基础。
difficult_points: can 表示设计特征有可能引发争论，并非每项特征都必然如此。
the basis for 表示争论围绕这些设计特征展开。

sentences.sentence: For example, one argument is that if all packaging is white with black lettering, people would have no choice but to read every box carefully.
sentences.translation: 例如，有一种观点认为，如果所有包装都是白底黑字，人们就只能认真阅读每一个药盒。

structure.text: that if all packaging is white with black lettering, people would have no choice but to read every box carefully
if all packaging is white with black lettering

difficult_points: that 从句作表语，说明 one argument 的具体内容。
if 从句提出假设；would have no choice but to... 表示结果是只能逐盒阅读。

sentences.sentence: The problem is that trials of drug packaging design are few—common studies of legibility and comprehensibility concern road traffic signs and visual display units.
sentences.translation: 问题在于药品包装设计的试验很少——常见的易读性和可理解性研究主要针对道路交通标志和视觉显示设备。

structure.text: that trials of drug packaging design are few
common studies of legibility and comprehensibility concern road traffic signs and visual display units

difficult_points: that 从句作表语，具体说明问题；few 表示相关试验数量很少。
破折号后的完整分句解释为何包装设计缺乏直接证据；concern 在此表示研究对象是。

sentences.sentence: Although some designers take results from such studies into account, proving that a particular feature is beneficial can be difficult.
sentences.translation: 尽管一些设计师会参考这类研究的结果，但要证明某项具体设计特征确实有益并不容易。

structure.text: Although some designers take results from such studies into account
proving that a particular feature is beneficial
that a particular feature is beneficial

difficult_points: Although 引导让步，说明参考其他领域研究并不等于能证明包装特征有效。
proving... 是动名词短语作主语；that 从句作 proving 的宾语。

sentences.sentence: For example, EU legislation requires that packaging must now include the name of the medicine in Braille but, according to Karel van der Waarde, a design consultant to the pharmaceutical industry, "it is not known how much visually impaired patients will benefit nor how much the reading of visually able patients will be impaired".
sentences.translation: 例如，欧盟法规要求包装现在必须以盲文标示药品名称；但制药行业设计顾问卡雷尔·范德瓦尔德指出，“目前尚不清楚视障患者能从中受益多少，也不知道视力正常患者的阅读会受到多大影响”。

structure.text: that packaging must now include the name of the medicine in Braille
but, according to Karel van der Waarde
a design consultant to the pharmaceutical industry
it is not known how much visually impaired patients will benefit nor how much the reading of visually able patients will be impaired

difficult_points: requires 后的 that 从句说明法规要求；must 强调强制性。
Karel... 与 a design consultant... 是同位关系。
引语中 it 是形式主语，两个由 nor 连接的 how much 从句说明尚不明确的两方面影响。

sentences.sentence: More evidence might, however, soon be available.
sentences.translation: 不过，或许很快就会有更多证据。
difficult_points: however 插在情态动词结构中，表示与前文证据不足形成转折。
might 表示作者谨慎预测，soon 修饰 available 的时间。

sentences.sentence: EU legislation requires PILs to reflect consultations with target patient groups to ensure they are legible, clear and easy to use.
sentences.translation: 欧盟法规要求患者信息说明书体现与目标患者群体协商的结果，以确保说明书易读、清晰且便于使用。

structure.text: to reflect consultations with target patient groups
to ensure they are legible, clear and easy to use

difficult_points: require + 宾语 + to do 表示法规要求 PILs 必须体现协商结果。
第二个 to ensure 是目的状语；they 指 PILs，三个形容词并列作表语。

sentences.sentence: This implies that industry will have to start conducting tests.
sentences.translation: 这意味着制药行业将不得不开始开展测试。

structure.text: that industry will have to start conducting tests

difficult_points: This 回指法规要求说明书反映目标患者群体的咨询结果。
will have to 表示未来的客观义务；start 后接 conducting，表示开始持续开展测试。

sentences.sentence: Dr. van der Waarde has performed readability studies on boxes and PILs for industry.
sentences.translation: 范德瓦尔德博士已经为制药行业开展了药盒和患者信息说明书的可读性研究。

structure.text: readability studies on boxes and PILs

difficult_points: has performed 使用现在完成时，说明他截至目前已有相关研究经验。
on boxes and PILs 修饰 studies，说明研究对象；for industry 说明服务对象。

sentences.sentence: A typical study involves showing a leaflet or package to a small group and asking them questions to test understanding.
sentences.translation: 典型研究会把说明书或包装展示给一个小组，并向组员提问以测试其理解程度。

structure.text: showing a leaflet or package to a small group
and asking them questions to test understanding

difficult_points: involve 后接 showing 和 asking 两个并列动名词，说明研究流程。
them 指 a small group 中的参与者；to test understanding 是提问的目的。

sentences.sentence: Results and comments are used to modify the material, which is then tested on a larger group.
sentences.translation: 研究结果和反馈意见用于修改材料，修改后的材料再交给更大的群体测试。

structure.text: which is then tested on a larger group

difficult_points: are used to modify 是被动结构，说明结果与意见的用途。
which 指 the material；is then tested 表示修改后进入下一轮测试。

sentences.sentence: A third group is used to show that any further changes made are an improvement.
sentences.translation: 第三组参与者用于验证此后所作的任何修改确实带来了改善。

structure.text: that any further changes made are an improvement

difficult_points: to show... 表示使用第三组的目的；that 从句作 show 的宾语。
made 是过去分词，后置修饰 changes；are an improvement 表示修改后的版本优于之前。

expressions.meaning_zh: 随后所作的进一步修改

sentences.sentence: Dr. van der Waarde is, however, sceptical about the legal requirements and says that many regulatory authorities do not have the resources to handle packaging information properly.
sentences.translation: 不过，范德瓦尔德博士对这些法律要求持怀疑态度，并指出许多监管机构没有足够资源妥善处理包装信息。

structure.text: is, however, sceptical about the legal requirements
that many regulatory authorities do not have the resources to handle packaging information properly

difficult_points: however 插入系表结构，表示他虽开展测试，却对法规执行效果持保留态度。
is... 和 says 是并列谓语；that 从句说明怀疑的现实依据。
to handle... 后置修饰 resources，说明监管机构缺少的是哪方面资源。

sentences.sentence: "They do not look at the use of packaging in a practical context—they only see one box at a time and not several together as pharmacists would do," he said.
sentences.translation: 他说：“他们没有在实际情境中考察包装的使用——每次只看一个药盒，而不像药剂师那样同时面对多个药盒。”

structure.text: do not look at the use of packaging in a practical context
they only see one box at a time and not several together as pharmacists would do

difficult_points: They 指 many regulatory authorities；破折号后的分句解释其测试脱离实际的表现。
one box at a time 与 several together 构成对比。
as pharmacists would do 是比较从句，do 代替 see several boxes together。

sentences.sentence: Innovations
sentences.translation: 创新设计
difficult_points: 这是本节小标题，引出改善患者安全与便利性的创新产品设计。
Innovations 使用复数，表明下文会列举多项创新方案。

sentences.sentence: The RCA innovation exhibition this year revealed designs for a number of innovative objects."The popper", by Hugo Glover, aims to help arthritis sufferers remove tablets from blister packs, and "pluspoint", by James Cobb, is an adrenaline auto-injector that aims to overcome the fact that many patients do not carry their auto-injectors due to their prohibitive size.
sentences.translation: 今年的皇家艺术学院创新展展示了多种创新产品设计。雨果·格洛弗设计的“The popper”旨在帮助关节炎患者从泡罩包装中取出药片；詹姆斯·科布设计的“pluspoint”则是一种肾上腺素自动注射器，旨在解决许多患者因注射器体积过大而不随身携带的问题。

structure.text: The RCA innovation exhibition this year
designs for a number of innovative objects
"The popper", by Hugo Glover, aims to help arthritis sufferers remove tablets from blister packs
"pluspoint", by James Cobb, is an adrenaline auto-injector
that aims to overcome the fact that many patients do not carry their auto-injectors due to their prohibitive size

difficult_points: 源文在句号与第二句开引号之间缺少空格，因此两个书写句合并为一个分析单元以保持原文。
help + 宾语 + 动词原形表示帮助关节炎患者取药；两个 by 短语分别说明设计者。
that 修饰 auto-injector；其中第二个 that 从句同位说明 the fact，due to 引出患者不携带的原因。

expressions.meaning_zh: 从泡罩包装中取出药片
由于体积大到令人难以接受

sentences.sentence: The aim of good design, according Roger Coleman, professor of inclusive design at the RCA, is to try to make things more user-friendly as well as safer.
sentences.translation: 皇家艺术学院包容性设计教授罗杰·科尔曼认为，优秀设计的目标是努力让产品既更方便使用，也更加安全。

structure.text: professor of inclusive design at the RCA
to try to make things more user-friendly as well as safer

difficult_points: according Roger Coleman 是源文写法，标准搭配通常为 according to Roger Coleman；翻译按其观点理解。
professor... 是 Roger Coleman 的同位语。
make + 宾语 + 形容词构成复合宾语，more user-friendly 与 safer 由 as well as 连接。

sentences.sentence: Surely, in a patient-centred health system, that can only be a good thing.
sentences.translation: 显然，在以患者为中心的医疗体系中，这只会是一件好事。
difficult_points: that 回指通过良好设计提高易用性和安全性。
can only be 在此表达强烈判断“只可能是好事”；patient-centred 表示以患者需求为中心。

expressions.text: can only be a good thing

sentences.sentence: "Information design for patient safety" is not intended to be mandatory.
sentences.translation: 《患者安全信息设计》并不打算成为强制性规范。
difficult_points: 书名整体作主语，is intended 是被动结构，说明出版物的定位。
mandatory 表示依法或制度上必须执行，而本文明确否定这种定位。

sentences.sentence: Rather, its purpose is to create a basic design standard and to stimulate innovation.
sentences.translation: 相反，它的目的是建立基本设计标准并推动创新。

structure.text: to create a basic design standard and to stimulate innovation

difficult_points: Rather 承接上一句，说明该出版物不是强制规范，而是提供基础和激发创新。
to create 与 to stimulate 是两个并列不定式作表语；its 指该书。

sentences.sentence: The challenge for the pharmaceutical industry, as a whole, is to adopt such a standard.
sentences.translation: 对整个制药行业而言，挑战在于采纳这样的标准。

structure.text: The challenge for the pharmaceutical industry

difficult_points: as a whole 插入修饰 the pharmaceutical industry，强调需要全行业参与。
to adopt... 作表语，说明 challenge 的具体内容；such a standard 回指基本设计标准。
